revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Inoue-sha
| native_name = 御手洗社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Inoue-sha
| coordinates = {{coord|35.038994|135.773541}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Inoue-sha'''|御手洗社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q1071160|ltq=Q1071160|qid=Q1071160|1=Setsumatsusha}}
* {{ill|Q135009157|ltq=Q135009157|qid=Q135009157|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai and Ainame-sai offerings}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917288|ltq=Q134917288|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}
* {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180603</ref>
* {{ill|Q135100459|ltq=Q135100459|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q701620|ltq=Q701620|qid=Q701620|1=Shimogamo Shrine}}
* {{ill|Q11467693|ltq=Q11467693|qid=Q11467693|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province}}
** Series ordinal: 34
** P155: {{ill|Kamigamo Shrine|lt=Kamigamo Shrine|ar|معبد كاميغامو|arz|مزار كامى جامو|ca|Santuari de Kamigamo|el|Ναός Καμιγκάμο|en|Kamigamo Shrine|eo|Sanktejo Kamigamo|es|Santuario Kamigamo|fa|معبد کامیگامو|fi|Kamigamo-jinja|fr|Kamigamo-jinja|hu|Kamigamo szentély|id|Kuil Kamigamo|ja|賀茂別雷神社|ko|가모와케이카즈치 신사|la|Templum Kamigamo|my|ခမိဂမိုနတ်ကျောင်း|ne|कामिगामो तीर्थ|pl|Kamigamo-jinja|pt|Kamowakeikazuchi-jinja|ru|Камигамо-дзиндзя|simple|Kamigamo Shrine|sl|Svetišče Kamigamo|sv|Kamowakeikazuchi-jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าคามิงาโมะ|tr|Kamigamo Tapınağı|zh|賀茂別雷神社|qid=Q700448|1=Kamigamo Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q701620|ltq=Q701620|qid=Q701620|1=Shimogamo Shrine}}
